quests.name: Bloom the Block
quests.summary: Chrees wants the whole block bursting with colour.

steps.desc: Collect all 3 flowers around the block.
Tell Chrees the block's in bloom.

quests.name: Hamster Roundup
quests.summary: Five of Adrian's pet-shop hamsters escaped their cage and scattered across town.

steps.desc: Bring the hamsters home to Adrian.

g1.text: Hey! You're the one bouncing around this block, huh?

g2.text: Name's Chrees. I get my reps in down this street — good shade between the towers.

job.text: Funny you ask. This block's looking a little grey — but there's flowers tucked all around it.

job2.text: Pluck all three — up the steps, down each road — and the whole place'll feel alive. You in, champ?

jobAccept.text: That's the spirit! Three flowers. Come tell me when the block's in bloom.

jobLater.text: No rush. The block's not going anywhere.

t1.text: Easy — jump for joy after every win. Celebrating IS the rep.

t2.text: Squash down low, then launch. Your whole body remembers the bounce.

f1.text: Saw a pink one back up the stairs, and one down each road. Go get 'em, champ!

progress.text: How's the bloom coming? Found those flowers yet?

progAck.text: Keep at it — every flower counts. The block's counting on you.

hint.text: Up the stairs, and one down each side street. Go on, champ!

ready.text: Whoa — would you look at that. The whole block's in BLOOM!

ready2.speaker: Shen
ready2.text: All three flowers, picked with love!

ready3.text: This street's never looked better. Respect, champ. ✿

done.text: Every time I look around, more colour. Thanks for the bloom, champ. ✿

intro.text: Oh! Hello there. I'm Adrian — I mind the little pet shop just here.

intro2.text: I'm in a bit of a flap, honestly. I left the hamster cage open and... well.

intro3.text: Five of my hamsters slipped out and scattered all over town. I can't chase them myself.

offer.text: You're so quick on your feet — would you help me round up my five little ones?

accept.text: Oh, thank you, truly! Bring each one back to me — gently, they're shy little things.

hint.text: They love warm corners — try the steps, and down both side streets. Listen for tiny squeaks!

later.text: That's alright. I'll be right here if you change your mind.

progress.text: Any luck with my little escapees? They're awfully quick, I know.

progAck.text: Thank you for trying. Every one you bring back is a weight off my heart.

ready.text: You found them ALL? Oh — come here, you fuzzy little troublemakers!

ready2.speaker: Shen
ready2.text: Every last hamster, safe and sound!

ready3.text: I can't thank you enough. The shop feels whole again — you're always welcome here. ✿

done.text: There you are! The hamsters keep squeaking for you. Thank you again, friend. ✿
